text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm taking a walk in the park on my day off when I hear someone call
out to me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: What a coincidence, meeting you here.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm strolling around without a destination... Or put simply, I'm just
taking a walk. I often spend my weekends doing so.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My friends like to say that I'm good at idling away time, but as an
American, I find the scenery here to be a delight.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Besides, even on my days off, I grow restless if I don't get at least a
little exercise.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I can enjoy the spirit of this country as I move through it... Walking is
a form of entertainment for me. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Still, I've seen all there is to see in this area, so I'm pondering where
to go next.
choice_data_list: How about I show you somewhere?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Somewhere good for a walk? That would be wonderful.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you know of some delightful areas that I'm not yet familiar
with.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I gladly accept your offer. Let's have a nice stroll, just the two
of us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I come up with a few places she might not be aware of, and we set off
together to see them.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
To think there was a tea house tucked away so close by. I had no
idea!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
What a lovely slice of Japanese tradition, undisturbed by the trendy
boutiques around it.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Look, so many items on the menu use my favorite
ingredient—matcha. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
...Ah, but it may have been a mistake coming here. These sweet treats
are so tempting... ahhh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass and I continue our walk, visiting various local places of
interest...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I enjoy my usual quiet walks, but today's outing has been delightfully
stimulating too. You've shown me so many things.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Where shall we go next, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thinking on Grass Wonder's request, I have a look around and
happen to see something interesting.
choice_data_list: How about that arcade over there?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: An arcade? I can't say I'm very familiar with such places...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: It might also not be the best place to have a calm and relaxing walk...
choice_data_list: But you might discover something new.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Something new...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
That's true. In the course of our walk so far, I've made a number of
such discoveries.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
...All right. Since I'm on this rare walk with you, I shall trust in your
advice.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: It really is a lively place.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Trainer, what sort of game is this?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder curiously eyes a dance game controlled by foot
movement.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
A game one plays by performing dance steps? It sounds not unlike a
Winning Concert.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: What? Who... me?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Well... I have been trained in dancing, so I suppose I might be able to...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'll do it. But please, don't laugh when you see me making a
mess of things.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grass Wonder begins playing while I watch.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Um... Hm... A-ah?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: My winning concert experience... didn't exactly translate.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I certainly enjoyed myself nonetheless. I even got some
exercise out of it.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I didn't know there were games like this. I'm learning about many new
things today.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
This is yet another discovery I've made thanks to our walk together.
Thank you very much for coming with me, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'd love it if you could join me for another walk sometime. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Now, let me try this just once more...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
"To speak without words"... Amazing, you understood my reasoning
without the need for explanation.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Keep watching—I'm going to clear this next one.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... This is more difficult than I anticipated.
choice_data_list: Shall we move on to something else?
Shall we move on to something else?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: My—are you jesting? Why, I've still barely begun to exert myself.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm going to play one more time. For the exercise, you
understand!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our day together continues until Grass Wonder finally masters her
dance game skills.
